transcript.text:
[The biggest size please]
It's pretty big
[This big]
[Today's Menu: Gopchang Jeongol (Pork Small Intestine Stew)]
Tzuyang?
Is that Tzuyang?
Really?
[Eat up]
Look at all this
I've never seen anything like it
Aren't you shocked?
Not really
[Piece of cake]
She's still growing so it's okay
She's young
[Unusual reaction]

Hello everyone
It's been a really long time since I had Pork Gopchang Jeongol
Probably about 3 years since I had pork intestines over beef intestines
It's really been a while
This place has 40 years of tradition
And had really great reviews
Ta-da Here
[Jeon Nong Gopchang Sing] [Seoul, Dongdaemun-gu]
What's "sing"?
Hello
Smells good
[Today's menu]
Excuse me
[Who, me?]
How big is the Large?
It's a lot of food

What is "sing"?
-The pig's reproductive organ -Huh?
Reproductive organ
[Sing: Pig's reproductive organ]
[Get your mind out of the gutter!]
Well then
I'll get pork gopchang jeongol
The biggest size you have, please
They only have the stew and the "sing"
I don't think I can eat the "sing"
So that's what "sing" is
I'll eat a simple meal today
[Simple...]
[This much?!]
[With all the seasoning]
This place has been here for over 40 years

Mother in law prepares everything herself every morning
86 years old
She must have seen it on YouTube
Tzuyang? Is it Tzuyang?
[She recognized Tzuyang right away]
[I love it]
[Drinking the cold white kimchi soup]
It tastes good
We make it ourselves That's why
Really?
Of course The kimchi too
[Homemade kimchi]
That's so good
[Pork Gopchang Jeongol coming to a boil]
Thank you That looks so good
Look at all that

I've never seen anything like it
This is just what I like
Gopchang explosion
This is a first
Some glass noodles first
The stew usually has a lot more vegetables than intestines
This place serves all intestines
Incredible
Some soup first
The red goodness
This is the real deal
So good
[Tzuyang is here?]
Hello
Welcome
My daughter is going crazy for you

Really?
-It's going to be good -Is it?
It's packed with intestines
This is what we always serve
You're so adorable
My daughter's a fan
Hello
She's going nuts
It's an honor to meet you in person
Such a famous person coming to our store
A lot of people said that this place is a gem
I said that she looks like IU
No no
Thank you
Thank you for the meal
The visuals are crazy

I just had some soup
It has that...
[Let's eat first]
So good
This almost doesn't have any pork smell
It's not a bad smell either
Very savory
That's so delicious
There's a very famous intestine restaurant nearby
This place is more like a hidden gem
A lot of locals come here
It's been a while It's going to be great
Looks so soft
This is the best pork intestine soup I've ever had
I haven't had a lot, but it's the best
So good

When I first bite into it, It's just so soft
The chewiness and softness coexist
Very soft
For an intestine
Really soft
Soft, tender, and chewy
Let's try it with their sauce
Ssamjang (soybean seasoning paste) and perilla powder?
They said to use this
It's good by itself too
Tasty
So good
This place is a gem A real gem
Well-cooked glass noodles
Check out the colors And the portion
Amazing

Let's eat all the glass noodles before it soaks up all the soup
It's so good
[Putting it to the side for it to cool down]
[They're preparing something]
The soup has a kick to it
[A gift for you]
Thank you
From the owner
Thank you for the plum juice
Try one It's so good
PD: Later
It's really good
Thank you~
Love it
Wrap the intestine with the noodles
I love how there are no veggies

Just how I like it
Only scallions and perilla leaf
I love it
[Perilla leaf wrap]
The soup is not spicy, but it has a refreshing kick to it
And it stacks
Glass noodles on the leaf
Intestines
[+Sauce]
What if I mix plum juice with cider?
Just a little bit
Not bad
[Still this much left]
It's a gopchang mountain
[How many pieces is that?]
With perilla leaf

Some radish
This is a lot
A Large
40,000 Won (~$32 USD)
It's a lot of food Really
Every bite surprises me
How is it this soft?
This is too delicious
[Warm it up again]
I'll finish this and scoop some out
And make fried rice
That's good too
Of course,
Why do I always wear white when I eat red?
Am I dumb?
Goodbye to my top, once again

Scoop this out
Make some fried rice here
Can I get fried rice?
[Cut it all up]
[Add perilla leaves]
[Is that enough?]
Eat some more
Aren't you shocked?
Not at all
My son eats a lot too
It's so tasty
[Something even better]
That looks great
-Eat a lot -Yes ma'am, thank you for the meal
[See ya]
[To be honest...]

[Although she reacted this way,]
-I felt bad -About what?
[A lady that's eating a lot]
[Just to make her feel comfortable and not embarrassed]
I should've ordered 2 servings I'm regretting it right away
I ordered 1 as a habit
But I feel like this is perfectly seasoned
Maybe it's a good thing I ordered 1 because of the seasoning
Let's see
This is phenomenal
I don't really eat fried rice
But this is a MUST
This is the best
I should've ordered 2
No...
2 wouldn't have tasted like this

Kimchi is good too Let's get some on top
This place is a true gem
Everything's good here
[Gopchang and glass noodles on top]
[Let's make a wrap]
[She's doing it all]
The soup
[Where did the fried rice go?]
[Trying to scrape everything off the pot]
This is not enough
This place passed on decades of tradition
The pork intestines did not have a smell to them maybe because they prepare it themselves
I had such a great meal
Thanks everyone
Good job eating it all Great job!
Did I eat a lot?

-I'll eat more next time -Sure
Thank you for the meal I'll be back
Go like and subscribe to her channel
[And that's how gained another precious subscriber]
[Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
